name: CARE Doctor Connect
description: Doctor directory and connection plugin for CARE. Enables searching and connecting with healthcare providers across facilities and organizations.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_doctor_connect_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

optional.label: Allowed facility organizations
optional.description: Optional list of facility organization names to show in doctor connect directory. If not set, all organizations are shown.

optional.label: Allowed filter roles
optional.description: Optional list of role names to show in filter. If not set, all roles are shown.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.

optional.label: Allowed facility organizations
optional.description: Optional list of facility organization names to show in doctor connect directory. If not set, all organizations are shown.

optional.label: Allowed filter roles
optional.description: Optional list of role names to show in filter. If not set, all roles are shown.
